channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VIVIMEDLAB] Vivimed Labs Ltd Announces Q3 FY 2026 Results: Profit Before Tax at Rs. 314.95 Million
item.description:
Vivimed Labs Ltd, a company listed on the National Stock Exchange of India, has announced its Q3 FY 2026 results. The company's standalone financial results show a profit before tax of Rs. 314.95 million for the quarter. The total revenue from operations stands at Rs. 1,392.85 million. The company's consolidated financial results also show a profit before tax of Rs. X (amount not provided) for the quarter. The financial results have been prepared in accordance with the Indian Accounting Standards and other accounting principles generally accepted in India.

  • Profit before tax at Rs. 314.95 million for the quarter
  • Total revenue from operations at Rs. 1,392.85 million
  • Financial results prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIVIMED LABS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [FIRSTCRY] FirstCry Expands 'Qwik' Delivery Service to Bengaluru, Pune, and Hyderabad
item.description:
🔥 Trending

FirstCry, India’s largest multi-channel, multi-brand retailing platform for Mothers’, Babies’, and Kids’ products, has announced the expansion of its ‘Qwik’ delivery service across select pincodes in Bengaluru, Pune, and Hyderabad. The service promises delivery of a wide range of baby and kids' products in less than 3 hours. The company is leveraging its existing modern store network and RocketBees, a tech-enabled asset-light logistics initiative, to enable quicker fulfilment of orders. The model, which was launched in December 2025, has already seen strong traction and is expected to deliver around 60,000 orders via the Qwik network in March 2026 alone. Following this rollout, FirstCry plans to expand the Qwik service to other pincodes in these three cities and to Delhi NCR, Ahmedabad and Chennai in the next phase.

  • FirstCry expands 'Qwik' delivery service to Bengaluru, Pune, and Hyderabad
  • Delivery of a wide range of baby and kids' products in less than 3 hours
  • Leveraging existing modern store network and RocketBees for quicker fulfilment
  • Expected to deliver around 60,000 orders via the Qwik network in March 2026
  • Plans to expand the Qwik service to other pincodes and cities in the next phase

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brainbees Solutions Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [BHARATCOAL] BCCL Approves Termination of Contract Agreement with Loyabad Coalfields Private Limited
item.description:
Bharat Coking Coal Ltd (BCCL) has announced the approval of the termination of a Contract Agreement with Loyabad Coalfields Private Limited for the 'Reopening, Development & Operation of Loyabad Coal Mine on Revenue Sharing Basis'. The decision was made in a meeting held on 13.03.2026. The feasibility of the mine will be reviewed and further course of action will be decided accordingly.

  • BCCL approves termination of Contract Agreement with Loyabad Coalfields Private Limited
  • The termination is for the 'Reopening, Development & Operation of Loyabad Coal Mine on Revenue Sharing Basis'
  • The feasibility of the mine will be reviewed for further course of action
  • The decision was made in a meeting held on 13.03.2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd | Category: Contract Termination

item.title: [NH] Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd Incorporates a Wholly-Owned Subsidiary in the UK
item.description:
Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd, a healthcare company, has incorporated a wholly-owned step-down subsidiary named Practice Plus Group Property Ltd in the United Kingdom. This new subsidiary will acquire, hold, develop, and maintain immoveable hospital infrastructure in the UK for exclusive captive use by hospital operating entities within the Group. The subsidiary is a related party of the company, but the promoter/promoter group/group companies are not interested in the transaction. The subsidiary is incorporated under the Companies Act, 2006 of the UK with a paid-up share capital of GBP 1000 and no turnover as it is newly incorporated. The subsidiary will be used within the Group's operations in the UK, generally referred to as Opco/Propco structure.

  • Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd incorporates a wholly-owned step-down subsidiary in the UK
  • Subsidiary named Practice Plus Group Property Ltd
  • Subsidiary will acquire, hold, develop, and maintain hospital infrastructure in the UK
  • Subsidiary is a related party but promoter/promoter group/group companies are not interested in the transaction
  • Newly incorporated under the Companies Act, 2006 of the UK with a paid-up share capital of GBP 1000 and no turnover

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Narayana Hrudayalaya Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SBILIFE] SBI Life Insurance Receives GST Order of Rs. 5,95,90,079 for FY 2019-2020
item.description:
SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd has received an intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR regarding a GST Order from the Joint Commissioner CGST & Central Excise Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The order, received on August 31, 2024, pertains to a tax demand of Rs. 5,95,90,079 and a penalty of Rs. 59,94,291 for the Financial Year 2019-2020. The Company has also received an Order from the Commissioner (Appeals), Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh on March 13, 2026, confirming the tax demand and interest. The Company plans to file an appeal before the Competent Authority/ Appellate Tribunal against the said order. The Company assures that the order will not have any adverse material impact on its financial operations.

  • SBI Life Insurance received a GST Order for FY 2019-2020
  • The order includes a tax demand of Rs. 5,95,90,079 and a penalty of Rs. 59,94,291
  • The Company has received an Order from the Commissioner (Appeals), Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh
  • The Company plans to file an appeal before the Competent Authority/ Appellate Tribunal
  • The order will not have any adverse material impact on the Company's financial operations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [GTIL] Gabion Technologies India Ltd: Statutory Auditor Resigns Over Remuneration Disagreement
item.description:
In a recent board meeting, Gabion Technologies India Ltd announced the resignation of its statutory auditor, M/s SV] & Company, due to disagreement over auditor’s remuneration. The company had initially received an email communication from the Statutory Auditors intimating their decision to resign. However, the management believed the matter was being resolved and that the resignation would be withdrawn. The company became aware of the auditors' resignation only when they filed Form ADT-3 with the Registrar of Companies. The auditors have confirmed that there are no other reasons for their resignation other than the disagreement over remuneration.

  • Gabion Technologies India Ltd announces resignation of statutory auditor
  • Auditor's resignation due to disagreement over auditor’s remuneration
  • Company believed the matter was being resolved
  • Auditors filed Form ADT-3 with the Registrar of Companies
  • No other reasons for resignation except the disagreement over remuneration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gabion Technologies India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GTIL] Gabion Technologies India Ltd: Statutory Auditors Resign Over Remuneration Disagreement
item.description:
In a recent development, Gabion Technologies India Ltd announced the resignation of their Statutory Auditors, M/s SV] & Company, due to a disagreement over auditor's remuneration. The resignation was tendered on 30th January, 2026, and the company has provided a detailed disclosure as required under SEBI regulations. The company had initially received an email communication from the Statutory Auditors intimating their decision to resign due to disagreement over auditor’s remuneration. Despite the company's efforts to resolve the issue, the auditors filed Form ADT-3 with the Registrar of Companies, indicating their resignation. The company became aware of this only upon receiving a copy of the ADT-3 filing receipt.

  • Gabion Technologies India Ltd announces resignation of Statutory Auditors
  • Resignation due to disagreement over auditor's remuneration
  • Company made efforts to resolve the issue
  • Auditors filed Form ADT-3 with Registrar of Companies
  • Company became aware of resignation through ADT-3 filing receipt

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gabion Technologies India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VENTIVE] Ventive Hospitality Receives Demand Notice from Income Tax Department
item.description:
Ventive Hospitality Ltd. has received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department, Ministry of Finance. The notice pertains to an erroneous tax demand of INR 6,37,96,318 for the Financial Year 2023-24. The company is confident that the demand will be rectified and nullified at the earliest. The notice does not impact the financial position, operations, or any other activities of the company.

  • Ventive Hospitality Ltd. has received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department, Ministry of Finance.
  • The demand notice is regarding an erroneous tax demand of INR 6,37,96,318 for the Financial Year 2023-24.
  • The company is confident that the demand will be rectified and nullified at the earliest.
  • The notice does not impact the financial position, operations, or any other activities of the company.
  • Ventive Hospitality is planning to file a rectification application under Section 154 of the Income Tax Act, 1961 before the concerned Assessing Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ventive Hospitality Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [HLEGLAS] HLE Glascoat Successfully Commissions 5.61 MW Captive Power Generation Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

HLE Glascoat Limited has successfully commissioned a captive power generation facility through Clean Max Anchorage Private Limited in the state of Gujarat. The facility has a solar power capacity of 2.31 MWp and a wind power capacity of 3.30 MW. This development is expected to optimize energy costs and ensure a sustainable power supply with no material financial implications at this stage.

  • HLE Glascoat Limited has successfully commissioned a 5.61 MW captive power generation facility in Gujarat through Clean Max Anchorage Private Limited.
  • The facility includes a solar power capacity of 2.31 MWp and a wind power capacity of 3.30 MW.
  • This development is expected to optimize energy costs and ensure a sustainable power supply.
  • The commissioning of the facility has been completed on 13/03/2026.
  • There are no material financial implications at this stage.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HLE Glascoat Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PNC] Pritish Nandy Communications Ltd: Re-Appointment of Two Independent Directors for a Second Consecutive Term
item.description:
Pritish Nandy Communications Ltd has circulated resolutions to all Directors for re-appointment of two Independent Directors, Mr. Sunil Kumar Alagh and Mr. Karan Ravi Ahluwalia, for a second consecutive term of five years each. The re-appointment is subject to approval of members of the Company by way of Postal Ballot. The Board has also approved the appointment of Mr. Vinayak N Deodhar as Scrutinizer for the Postal Ballot. The remote e-voting process will commence on March 17, 2026 and end on April 16, 2026. The results will be declared on or before April 19, 2026.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Sunil Kumar Alagh as an Independent Director for a second consecutive term of five years.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Karan Ravi Ahluwalia as an Independent Director for a second consecutive term of five years.
  • Appointment of Mr. Vinayak N Deodhar as Scrutinizer for the Postal Ballot.
  • Remote e-voting process for shareholders from March 17, 2026 to April 16, 2026.
  • Results of the Postal Ballot to be declared on or before April 19, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRITISH NANDY COMMUNICATIONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
